LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DONNA PAPPACHRISTOU'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS OFF CALENDAR. DUPLICATE ENTRY. THE MATTER IS SET FOR HEARING AT 9:00 AM ON THE DISCOVERY CALENDAR. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF DONNA PAPPACHRISTOU'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (AMENDED) IS DENIED AS MOOT. THE COURT FURTHER DENIES ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS. THE COURT URGES THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER IN GOOD FAITH IN THE FUTURE, INCLUDING LIVE PHONE CONVERSATIONS AS OPPOSED TO SOLELY EMAIL OR LETTER. THE COURT CANNOT COMMENT ON ANY OTHER MATTERS NOT BEFORE IT. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH RILES; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Motion And Pltfs Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF DONNA PAPPACHRISTOU'S Ntc Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories IS Off calendar. Duplicate entry. The matter is set for hearing at 9:00 am on the Discovery calendar. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S Special Interoggs (Amended)
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eugene Zinovyev, Esq. of Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP, Tel. 925.222.3400 for defendant;
No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF DONNA PAPPACHRISTOU'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories (Amended) is denied as moot. The Court further denies all requests for sanctions. The Court urges the parties to meet and confer in good faith in the future, including live phone conversations as opposed to solely email or letter. The Court cannot comment on any other matters not before it. (Order signed. However, Counsel walked out without filing order.) Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth Riles; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Set For Trial On Jul-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
